codeReview.summary: The implementation successfully accesses the desktopCapturer via IPC, retrieves the primary screen stream, sets up a background video element to process the stream, downscales the frames to max 720p, extracts JPEG frames at 1 fps, and sends them over the WebSocket. Proper cleanup logic for the video elements, media tracks, and intervals is also included.

summary: The desktop capturer integration feature was correctly implemented. The worker successfully adhered to the skill instructions by relying on compilation/typechecks rather than attempting to boot the Electron app locally. No issues were found.
